hooks.command: (cd /Users/lakshmisridevi/ProgramOS/programOS/frontend && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run lint 2>&1) && (cd /Users/lakshmisridevi/ProgramOS/programOS/backend && .venv/bin/pytest -v 2>&1) && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}' || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Build, lint, or tests failed. hooks.statusMessage: Running build, lint, and tests before commit...
